Man convicted of series of sexual and violent offences jailed for 15 years
results.description: A MAN convicted of a series of sexual and violent offences against a woman and sexually abusing a child has been jailed for 15 years. Aaron Trafford Stringfellow (33) appeared before the Royal Court yesterday after being found guilty of the offences, including four counts of rape, following a five-day trial.
